Event: Autumn Festival 2024
Event Date: 09/01/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A23
Legacy of the Gladiators

Triggers: Once in a while

The artifact owner casts a shield on 3 random allies. The shield absorbs 40% damage and lasts for 5 sec. If a shielded unit dies, they are resurrected with 20% health, and a random enemy takes pure damage equal to 30% of own max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
